本頁整合 Abiraterone Acetate 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Treatment of adult patients with prostate cancer.</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>migraine disorder（98.8%）</li>
<li>migraine with or without aura, susceptibility to（98.8%）</li>
<li>migraine with brainstem aura（98.6%）</li>
<li>leprosy（98.6%）</li>
<li>pulmonary hypertension（98.4%）</li>
<li>nephrogenic syndrome of inappropriate antidiuresis（98.2%）</li>
<li>rheumatoid arthritis（98.1%）</li>
<li>kyphoscoliotic heart disease（98.1%）</li>
<li>atrophoderma vermiculata（97.7%）</li>
<li>ulerythema ophryogenesis（97.5%）</li>
<li>brachydactyly-syndactyly syndrome（97.1%）</li>
<li>colobomatous microphthalmia-rhizomelic dysplasia syndrome（97.0%）</li>
<li>hyperthyroidism（95.7%）</li>
<li>resistance to thyroid hormone due to a mutation in thyroid hormone receptor beta（95.4%）</li>
<li>allergic asthma（95.3%）</li>
<li>pulmonary hypertension, primary, autosomal recessive（95.3%）</li>
<li>headache disorder（95.3%）</li>
<li>trigeminal autonomic cephalalgia（95.0%）</li>
<li>genetic multiple congenital anomalies/dysmorphic syndrome without intellectual disability（95.0%）</li>
<li>homozygous familial hypercholesterolemia（95.0%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
